headlines.title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
headlines.description: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.

headlines.title: Eleven cancers on the rise in young people - scientists find first clue on why it's happening
headlines.description: Researchers stress that simple lifestyle changes can still significantly reduce the risk of cancer.

headlines.title: A fresh financial crisis may be coming - it won't play out like the last one
headlines.description: Several warning lights are flashing that have some wondering whether we are in the foothills of another financial crisis.

headlines.title: Al Fayed survivor was modern slavery victim, says Home Office
headlines.description: Rachael Louw says she feels "vindication" and "validation" that her case has been recognised by the British government.

headlines.title: Early care scheme could prevent thousands of miscarriages a year
headlines.description: Current rules state that three unsuccessful pregnancies are needed to trigger NHS support - but a pilot project could bring about change.

headlines.title: Properties raided in modern slavery investigation
headlines.description: Officers from Cheshire Police and neighbouring forces target three properties in Crewe.

headlines.title: Former FBI director charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
headlines.description: The new case stems from a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director that the justice department says calls for violence against Trump.

headlines.title: Advert for £49 serum banned over 'five years younger' claim
headlines.description: Eucerin asked 160 people to use the serum for four weeks then say how much younger they thought they looked.

headlines.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
headlines.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the Pentagon has said only that the incident is under investigation.

headlines.title: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
headlines.description: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

headlines.title: Fashion, billionaires and jokes: Inside the White House state dinner
headlines.description: The night was filled with designer fashion, luscious bouquets, billionaire guests and joke-filled speeches.

headlines.title: The state visit in pictures
headlines.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla continued their state visit to the US with a White House state dinner and a speech from the King to Congress.

headlines.title: Watch: Washington rolls out red carpet for royal couple
headlines.description: During the White House state dinner, the King gifted the US president a bell from his WW2 submarine namesake, 'HMS Trump'.

headlines.title: King Charles gets ovation for Congress speech warning of volatile world
headlines.description: He tells US lawmakers his address comes the two nations' relationship is "more important" than ever "in times of great uncertainty".

headlines.title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
headlines.description: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

headlines.title: Should I Marry a Murderer? - the love story that uncovered a killer
headlines.description: True crime show follows a woman facing a life-changing dilemma after her fiancé makes a shock confession.

headlines.title: Faisal Islam: Why the UAE's exit from Opec is a big deal
headlines.description: It will have little effect on the current oil blockades, but it could change everything afterwards.

headlines.title: Billie Eilish puts Manchester at centre of new 3D concert film
headlines.description: Teaming up with filmmaking giant James Cameron, the superstar creates a unique love letter to her fans.

headlines.title: Nostalgia wasn't enough: What went wrong at Claire's
headlines.description: Experts says Claire's suffered from a perfect storm of issues which has spelled the end for the accessories chain.

headlines.title: I shouldn't have been made to visit abusive killer mum
headlines.description: Kelly Higgins said despite her mother being in jail for murder, she retained rights over her.

headlines.title: A record-breaking European semi-final - the antidote to modern football?
headlines.description: A scintillating semi-final first leg between Paris St-Germain and Bayern Munich left many to wonder if this was the antidote to modern football.

headlines.title: Laura Dern replaces Helena Bonham Carter in The White Lotus
headlines.description: The British actress left the hit show due to creative differences shortly after filming began.

headlines.title: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
headlines.description: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".

headlines.title: Endangered antelopes flown to Kenya from Czech zoo in 'historic homecoming'
headlines.description: The mountain bongo is a rare antelope endemic to Kenyan highland forests, with less than 100 in the wild.

headlines.title: Trump's face to feature on commemorative US passports
headlines.description: The passports will be released as part of the 250th anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence.

headlines.title: Woman harassed and beeped at by catcallers reports their untaxed van to DVLA
headlines.description: Despite feeling scared, Aneesa was determined to stand her ground and started filming the ordeal.

headlines.title: Japan zoo staffer allegedly dumps wife's body inside incinerator
headlines.description: The zoo has had to delay its reopening after a maintenance break, as police investigate the staff member's claim.

headlines.title: Grealish recovery 'couldn't be looking any better'
headlines.description: Jack Grealish says his recovery from the operation he had on his season-ending foot injury is going extremely well.

headlines.title: Chelsea's ex-England defender Bright retires

headlines.title: Former NFL player Mauro dies aged 35

headlines.title: Wales great North to retire from rugby
